creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please also check if it makes sense to use -O3 and/or --enable-fast=yes option(s) as upstream emphasizes on this? Preferably these options should go under "OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS"
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk#L386

Best regards,
Daniel
